# Home v3 — FROZEN

**Phase 7 benchmark. Do not edit the live Home to “improve” v3.**

Live routes remain as shipped in Phase 7.  
This folder holds a **duplicate snapshot** of the Home v3 sources for reference.

| Path | Role |
|------|------|
| `source-snapshot/` | Exact copies of Home v3 implementation files at freeze time |
| Phase 8 explorations | `../RADICAL-EXPLORATION.md` — concepts only, no code |

**Law:** Phase 8+ may propose new Homes. Implementation of a new Home requires an explicit phase that replaces v3 — not silent edits to the frozen benchmark.
